codeReview.summary: Implementation is scoped and aligned with the feature intent: it removes contradictory e2e function-not-found noise by excluding the e2e provider from background title-generation requests only when COVALT_E2E_TESTS=1, while leaving primary e2e tool execution behavior unchanged. Added tests cover both e2e-mode and non-e2e-mode provider selection paths.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared mission user-testing knowledge appears stale after this fix: it still documents Playwright approval-flow backend log noise as an expected quirk.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/user-testing.md:42 says intermittent `Function e2e_requires_approval not found` noise is expected, but commit 40cafe75759183a10a5d732320dbfee6fa55cb21 adds backend/services/title_generator.py e2e-mode filtering and handoff verification reports no matching log noise in /tmp/playwright-artifact-approval-after.log.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, skill procedure, and commit diff for feature playwright-e2e-tool-resolution-log-alignment; implementation quality is acceptable and passes scrutiny with no code defects identified. One shared-state observation was recorded for stale mission knowledge documentation.
